card.name: Aang Standard Notes — Sets AANG
card.text:
Sets: • FST (Falling Stars — Space set) • DON (Dreams of Nalen — Surreal dream set) (Reveal a Dream card from your sanctum and put it into your hand or draw a card.) • RGA (Rallea: Golden Age — Scifi set) • FWO (Forsaken Worlds — Zendikar alike) • DDR (Drakol: Divinity Rising — Generic fantasy set) • QES (Qianlin: Eternally Sealed — East asia setting)
FST mechanics: • Realize • Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) • Conjure • Warp (horrors)

card.name: Aang Standard Notes — Sets (pt2) AANG
card.text:
DON mechanics: • Sagas • Disturb • Omen • Dream (Reveal a Dream card from your sanctum and put it into your hand or draw a card.)
RGA mechanics: • Spacecraft • Craft with X • Uncover (but artifacts) (You may cast this as a noncreature artifact from your graveyard for its uncover cost. Exile it if it would leave the battlefield.) • Refined (When this creature enters, conjure its protocol into your sanctum.)
FWO mechanics: • Ascend • offspring • Landfall • Verdant (This card can't start in your deck. {1}, Exile an untapped land you control as a sorcery: Put this card from your sanctum onto the battlefield.)

card.name: Aang Standard Notes — Sets (pt3) AANG
card.text:
DDR mechanics: • Omens • Ascension (ability word: When a card leaves grave) • saga tokens (life-token-counter, surveil-draw-discard, bigpayoff-discard-sac, damage-damage-discard, land-pump-life, selection-token-drain) • companion-alike for gods (exile two perms that share a color with them)
QES mechanics: • Delve • evoke • mobilize • FORGIVE ([cost], reveal this from your sanctum: Put it into your graveyard)

card.name: IR Phoenix AANG
card.text: 4 Find Order in Chaos 4 In the World of Dreams 4 Reach for Enlightenment 3 Naer, King of Talan 2 Read the Stars 4 Piercing Lightning 4 Center Mass 2 Path to Infinity 4 Starfall Phoenix 3 Tannin Explorer 3 Sunset Seeker 3 Herald of Flame 3 Twisting Turmoil 4 Sunlit Cliffs 2 Towering Spires 4 Mystical Valley 4 Divine Gateway 2 Mountain 2 Fault sanctum 1 Rain of Flowers 1 Untouched Pinnacles 1 Unbroken Effigies 1 Village on the Peaks 1 Behold True Suns 1 Starseeker Whale 1 Hunger Arisen

card.name: Find Order in Chaos
card.text: Draw two cards, then discard two cards. Realize {2}{R}{R} (Then if you cast this spell for its realize cost, put it onto the battlefield as a creature after it resolves.)

card.name: Read the Stars
card.text: Sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.) Draw a card.

card.name: Piercing Lightning
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may discard a card. This spell deals 1 damage to target creature. If Piercing Lightning's additional cost was paid, it deals 5 damage instead.

card.name: Reach for Enlightenment
card.text: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: Sunset Seeker
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, Sunset Seeker deals 1 damage to each opponent. If it's the second time this ability has triggered this turn, instead create a Mystic's Quest token. (It's a Saga enchantment with r{1}—Create a 1/1 silver Mystic creature token, r{2}—Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life, and r{3}—Draw a card from your sanctum at random.)

card.name: Starfall Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste {5}{R}: Return Starfall Phoenix from your graveyard to the battlefield. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each instant or sorcery card in your graveyard.

card.name: Naer, King of Talan // Signs of Divinity
card.text:
Haste When Naer, King of Talan enters, draw two cards, then discard a card.
---
Surveil 1, then draw a card. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Human Noble // Sorcery — Omen

card.name: In the World of Dreams
card.text: Each player mills two cards. Draw a card.

card.name: Twisting Turmoil
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.) {X}{I}{I}, Exile X cards from your graveyard: You may cast a noncreature spell with mana value X from your sanctum without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Herald of Flame
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Haste When Herald of Flame enters, discard your hand, then draw three cards.

card.name: Center Mass
card.text: Center Mass deals 1 damage to any target. Surveil 3. (Look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Path to Infinity
card.text: Ascension — Path to Infinity deals 2 damage to any target. If a card left your graveyard this turn, it deals 3 damage to that target instead.

card.name: Sunlit Cliffs
card.text: As Sunlit Cliffs enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {I} or {R}.

card.name: Towering Spires
card.text: This land enters tapped. When it does, sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.) {T}: Add {I} or {R}.

card.name: Mystical Valley
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {I} or {R}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice Mystical Valley: Draw a card.

card.name: Divine Gateway
card.text: Divine Gateway enters tapped unless you control another land that could produce {I}. {T}: Add {I} or {R}.

card.name: Mystic's Quest AANG
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a 1/1 silver Mystic creature token II — Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. III — Draw a card from your sanctum at random.

card.name: Rain of Flowers
card.text: Forgive {2}. Activate only if there are eight or more cards in your sanctum. ({2}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Untouched Pinnacles
card.text: Verdant (This card can't start in your deck. {1}, Exile an untapped land you control as a sorcery: Put this card from your sanctum onto the battlefield.) {T}: Add {I} or {R}.

card.name: Unbroken Effigies
card.text: Verdant (This card can't start in your deck. {1}, Exile an untapped land you control as a sorcery: Put this card from your sanctum onto the battlefield.) {T}: Add {R}. {3}{R}{R}: Until end of turn, Unbroken Effigies becomes a 3/3 creature with menace.

card.name: Behold True Suns
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) As an additional cost to cast Behold True Suns, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Village on the Peaks
card.text: Verdant (This card can't start in your deck. {1}, Exile an untapped land you control as a sorcery: Put this card from your sanctum onto the battlefield.) {T}: Add {I}. {4}{I}{I}: Until end of turn, Village on the Peaks becomes a 4/4 creature with flying.

card.name: Starseeker Whale
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Flying Whenever Starseeker Whale attacks, sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.)

card.name: Hunger Arisen
card.text: Absolute (You may cast your chosen divinity from your sanctum by exiling two permanents you control that share a color with it in addition to its other costs.) Flying When Hunger Arisen enters, create X 1/1 silver Mystic creature tokens, where X is half the number of cards in your graveyard, rounded down.

card.name: Tannin Explorer
card.text: As long as you've cast a noncreature spell this turn, you may cast Tannin Explorer from your graveyard. It enters with a finality counter on it. Station (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery. It's an artifact creature at 3+.) [level 3+] Flying Whenever Tannin Explorer attacks, discard your hand, then draw two cards. [4/4]

card.name: Big Blue AANG
card.text: 4 Alom, Dreamlord 3 Galaxy Rings 2 Phantom Channeler 3 Cosmic Manipulation 3 Return to Essence 3 Celestial Command Center 3 Azali, Spectral Hunter 3 Stoneborn Crab 3 Gone in an Instant 4 Tempting Proposition 2 Unrestrained Tides 3 Ruminate 20 Island 4 Frozen Seascape sanctum 1 Abandoned Tradepost 1 Cloudwater Visions 1 Lotusfall 1 Prosperous Skyscape 1 Cosmic Nexus 1 Ardent Starkeeper 1 Hunting for Memories

card.name: Alom, Dreamlord
card.text: Flash When Alom, Dreamlord enters, tap each creature you don't control and put a stun counter on them. Disturb {5}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard transformed for its disturb cost.) --- (Back): Mirror Worlds

card.name: Mirror Worlds
card.text: For each nonland permanent you control, create a token that's a copy of it. Exile Mirror Worlds. --- (Front): Alom, Dreamlord

card.name: Galaxy Rings
card.text: Flash When Galaxy Rings enters, counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}. Craft with instant or sorcery {4}{U} ({4}{U}, Exile this artifact, Exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard: Return this card transformed under its owner's control. Craft only as a sorcery.) --- (Back): Cosmic Gateway

card.name: Cosmic Gateway
card.text: When Cosmic Gateway enters, create two 1/1 blue Scout creature tokens and surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) At the beginning of your end step, if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, draw a card. --- (Front): Galaxy Rings

card.name: Phantom Channeler // Drain Energy
card.text:
When Phantom Channeler enters, create a Wizard's Quest token. (It's a Saga enchantment with r{1}—Create a 1/1 blue Wizard creature token, r{2}—Surveil 2, and r{3}—Draw a card.)
---
Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Cosmic Manipulation
card.text: Counter target spell. Conjure two cards named Embrace the Void into your hand. (They're {U} instants with "Draw a card, then discard a card.")

card.name: Embrace the Void AANG
card.text: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Return to Essence
card.text: Choose one — • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Counter target triggered ability. If an ability of a creature was countered this way, return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: Unrestrained Tides
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Return each nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If you have the city's blessing, you may cast a spell from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Tempting Proposition
card.text: Draw three cards from your sanctum at random, then discard two cards.

card.name: Celestial Command Center
card.text: When Celestial Command Center enters, tap target creature and put two stun counters on it. Station (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery. It's an artifact creature at 4+.) [level 4+] Flying Tapped creatures your opponents control loses all abilities. [3/3]

card.name: Azali, Spectral Hunter
card.text: Menace When Azali, Spectral Hunter enters, if you cast it, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. {3}{U}: Draw a card.

card.name: Ruminate
card.text: Scry 1. Draw a card from your sanctum at random.

card.name: Stoneborn Crab
card.text: When Stoneborn Crab enters, blank target creature. (It loses all abilities.) Warp {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Gone in an Instant
card.text: Exile up to two target nonland permanents you control. Return one to the battlefield under its owner's control. Search your library for an instant or sorcery card with mana value equal to the other card not named Gone in an Instant, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Frozen Seascape
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}.) Frozen Seascape enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {2}{U}{U}, {T}: Scry 2.

card.name: Abandoned Tradepost
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {U}. {4}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice a Frontier: You may cast an instant or sorcery spell with mana value 3 or less from your sanctum without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Cloudwater Visions
card.text: Forgive {2}. Activate only if there are eight or more cards in your sanctum. ({2}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Draw two cards.

card.name: Lotusfall
card.text: Forgive—{U}, Exile two cards from your graveyard ({U}, Exile two cards from your graveyard, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Surveil 3. (Look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Properous Skyscape
card.text: Verdant (This card can't start in your deck. {1}, Exile an untapped land you control as a sorcery: Put this card from your sanctum onto the battlefield.) {T}: Add {U}. {4}{U}{U}: Until end of turn, Properous Skyscape becomes a 3/2 creature with flying and "Whenever Properous Skyscape deals combat damage to a player, draw a card."

card.name: Cosmic Nexus
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create an X/X blue Spirit creature token, where X is that spell's mana value.

card.name: Ardent Starkeeper
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Flying Whenever Ardent Starkeeper deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Hunting for Memories
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Draw two cards, then discard a card. II — Create a 1/1 blue Horror creature token with prowess. III — Noncreature spells you cast this turn cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Horror AANG
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Wizard's Quest
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a 1/1 blue Wizard creature token II — Surveil 2 (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) III — Draw a card

card.name: Druid Quest Arthold
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — ​ II — ​ III — ​

card.name: WB Unearth AANG
card.text: 4 Comfort of Return 2 Knight of Finality 2 Trial of Midnight 4 Ranor, Spectral Lightbearer 4 Steel Enforcer 3 Forgotten Cliffwatcher 4 Delve into Storms 4 Splinter into Nightmares 3 Fracture 3 Golden Slayer 2 Trap in Eternity 3 Sky Seer 4 Desolate Cliffside 4 Transcendent Towers 4 Prismatic Vista 2 Barren Heath 5 Swamp 3 Plains sanctum 1 Trial of Midnight

card.name: Comfort of Return
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Steel Enforcer
card.text: Refined (When this creature enters, conjure its protocol into your sanctum.) When Steel Enforcer enters, search your library for a card, put it into your graveyard, then shuffle. {4}{B}, Pay X life: Put a card with mana value X or less from your sanctum or graveyard into your hand. --- (Back): Enforcer's Decree

card.name: Enforcer's Decree
card.text: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand. (This is Steel Enforcer's protocol and is not legal for deckbuilding.) --- (Front): Steel Enforcer

card.name: Knight of Finality // Restore Horrors
card.text:
Lifelink When Knight of Finality enters, you draw a card and lose 3 life.
---
Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Trial of Midnight
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. II — Draw two cards. III — You lose 3 life, sacrifice a nonland permanent, and discard a card.

card.name: Forgotten Cliffwatcher
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land enters under your control, mill a card. As long as there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, Forgotten Cliffwatcher gets +2/+2 and has lifelink.

card.name: Ranor, Spectral Lightbearer
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Ranor, Spectral Lightbearer, exile a creature you control. Lifelink When Ranor, Spectral Lightbearer enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control.

card.name: Splinter into Nightmares
card.text: Destroy target creature. You lose 3 life unless you sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.

card.name: Fracture
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Destroy target creature if it has mana value 2 or less or you have the city's blessing.

card.name: Golden Slayer
card.text: When Golden Slayer enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, mill two cards. 1B —

card.name: Trap in Eternity
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target attacking creature with mana value 3 or less. • Exile target creature with mana value less than or equal to the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Delve into Storms
card.text: Mill four cards. Dream. (Reveal a Dream card from your sanctum and put it into your hand or draw a card.)

card.name: Sky Seer
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Vigilance When Sky Seer enters, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying, then you gain 1 life for each creature you control.

card.name: Desolate Cliffside
card.text: As Desolate Cliffside enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Transcendent Towers
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {W} or {B}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice Transcendent Towers: Draw a card.

card.name: Barren Heath
card.text: This land enters tapped. When it does, sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.) {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Prismatic Vista
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice Prismatic Vista: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Whispers of Autumn
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You gain 3 life. II — Create a 1/1 white Cleric creature token with vigilance. III — Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Watch by Candlelight
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less. II — Create a 2/2 white and black Demon creature token with lifelink. III — Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Mourn Lost Virtue
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Exile all creatures until Mourn Lost Virtue leaves the battlefield. II — Look at the top five cards of your library. Reveal any number of creature cards with total mana value 5 or less from among them and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order. III — Put a creature card with mana value 5 or less from your sanctum onto the battlefield.

card.name: Let Them Blossom
card.text: Forgive—{W}, Sacrifice a creature ({W}, Sacrifice a creature, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Exile it. You may play it during your next turn.) Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Darkstar Prowler
card.text: Skyward (You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.) Menace When Darkstar Prowler enters, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Burn Eternally Bright
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You draw three cards and lose 3 life. II — Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. III — Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Cleric AANG
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Bird AANG
card.text: Flying

card.name: Demon AANG
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Mono-red Aggro AANG
card.text: 4 Flamepeak Guardian 4 Aurora Reader 4 Lightning Strike 4 Ashfall Herald 4 Blood Howler 4 Mammoth Riders 4 Bleeding Moon Dragon 2 Unchained Monstrosity 2 Lone Explorer 3 Path to Infinity 3 Through Hellish Skies 20 Mountain

card.name: Flamepeak Guardian
card.text: Menace, haste Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, Flamepeak Guardian deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Aurora Reader
card.text: Whenever Aurora Reader attacks, conjure a card named Seek the Stars into your hand. (It's a {R} sorcery with "Seek the Stars deals 1 damage to each opponent.")

card.name: Seek the Stars
card.text: Seek the Stars deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Blood Howler
card.text: Haste Mobilize 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, create two tapped and attacking 1/1 red Warrior creature tokens. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.)

card.name: Lone Explorer
card.text: When Lone Explorer enters, it deals 3 damage to each opponent. Station (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this permanent. Station only as a sorcery. It's an artifact creature at 4+.) [level 4+] Flying, menace, trample [3/3]

card.name: Bleeding Moon Dragon
card.text: Flying Mobilize 1 (Whenever this creature attacks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 red Warrior creature token. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.) Other attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Ashfall Herald // Dictate of Ash
card.text:
When Ashfall Herald enters, create a Shaman's Quest token. (It's a Saga enchantment with r{1}—Create a 1/1 red Shaman creature token, r{2}—This deals 2 damage to each opponent, and r{3}—Target creature can't block this turn.)
---
Dictate of Ash deals 2 damage to each opponent. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Firemist Seeker
card.text: Craft with Creature {2}{R} ({2}{R}, Exile this artifact, Exile another Creature you control or a Creature card from your graveyard: Return this card transformed under its owner's control. Craft only as a sorcery.) --- (Back): Spatial Node

card.name: Spatial Node
card.text: Creatures you control with power 2 or less have haste. Whenever a creature you control dies, Spatial Node deals 1 damage to each opponent. --- (Front): Firemist Seeker

card.name: Unchained Monstrosity
card.text: Whenever Unchained Monstrosity enters or attacks or an opponent casts a spell with mana value 1, target opponent loses 1 life. Warp {BR} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Through Hellish Skies
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Through Hellish Skies deals 3 damage to each opponent. II — Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. III — You may discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards.

card.name: Lightning Strike
card.text: Lightning Strike deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Mammoth Riders
card.text: As long as there are no cards in your sanctum, Mammoth Riders has haste. Whenever Mammoth Riders deals combat damage to a player, exile a card at random from that player's sanctum. You may play it during your next turn.

card.name: Bant Sagas AANG
card.text: 3 Tared, First of the Divine 3 Druidic Visionary 4 Celestial Wielder 4 Dreamwatcher 3 Lakedancer Elk 3 Seedborn Combatant 2 Warden of Saplings 4 Glistening Hope 2 Stoneborn Crab 2 Heavenly Containment 3 Trap in Eternity 3 Path of Ascension 4 Prismatic Vista 3 Forest 2 Plains 2 Island 3 Frosted Landscape 4 Dawn Prarie 4 Tranquil Meadow 1 Frozen Cavern 2 Peaceful Jungle 1 Submerged Woodland sanctum 1 Mourn Lost Virtue 1 Whispers of Autumn 1 Hunting for Memories 1 Search for Essence 1 Visions of Bloom 1 Blessed by Sunlight 1 Haunted by Moonlight

card.name: Tared, First of the Divine
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Saga you control and each Saga card in your graveyard. If a chapter ability of a Saga you control would trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Druidic Visionary // Seek Wishes
card.text:
When Druidic Visionary enters, create a Druid's Quest token. (It's a Saga enchantment with r{1}—Create a 1/1 green Druid creature token, r{2}—You may play an additional land this turn, and r{3}—Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.)
---
Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Also shuffle this card.)

card.name: Celestial Wielder
card.text: Whenever a Saga you control leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Celestial Wielder. Whenever Celestial Wielder attacks, put a lore counter on up to one target Saga.

card.name: Dreamwatcher
card.text: When Dreamwatcher enters, dream. (Reveal a Dream card from your sanctum and put it into your hand or draw a card.)

card.name: Lakedancer Elk
card.text: Once each turn, when another creature you control enters, dream. (Reveal a Dream card from your sanctum and put it into your hand or draw a card.) Whenever Lakedancer Elk attacks, remove a counter from up to one target permanent.

card.name: Seedborn Combatant
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks, choose one — • Create a Druid's Quest token. (It's a Saga enchantment with r{1}—Create a 1/1 green Druid creature token, r{2}—You may play an additional land this turn, and r{3}—Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.) • Put a lore counter on each Saga you control.

card.name: Warden of Saplings
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Once each turn, when an enchantment you control enters, create a 1/1 green Treefolk token. If you have the city's blessing, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Heavenly Containment
card.text: Exile target creature an opponent controls until target enchantment you control leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Path of Ascension
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if an enchantment you control left the battlefield this turn, create a Wizard's Quest token. (It's a Saga enchantment with r{1}—Create a 1/1 blue Wizard creature token, r{2}—Surveil 2, and r{3}—Draw a card.)

card.name: Glistening Hope
card.text: Cleric tokens you control can't block. At the beginning of your first main phase, create a Cleric's Quest token. (It's a Saga enchantment with r{1}—Create a 1/1 white Cleric creature token, r{2}—You gain 2 life, and r{3}—Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.)

card.name: Search for Essence
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Search your library for two land cards and reveal them. Put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle. II — Put four +1/+1 counters on target noncreature permanent you control. It becomes a 0/0 creature. III — Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Haunted by Moonlight
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Each player draws two cards. II — You gain life equal to the number of cards in your hand. III — Return up to one other target permanent you control to its owner's land.

card.name: Blessed by Sunlight
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two 2/2 green and white Spirit creature tokens with vigilance. II — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. III — Shuffle any number of cards from your graveyard into your library. You gain that much life.

card.name: Visions of Flowering
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You may play an additional land this turn. II, III — Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Draw a card.

card.name: GI Ramp AANG
card.text: 4 Forgotten Wayfarer 3 In Full Bloom 3 other-ramp 2 other-ramp 4 Druid of High Earth 4 Forsaken Worlds 4 ramp target 2 ramp target 3 modal ramp target 3 removal 3 removal

card.name: Forgotten Wayfarer
card.text: {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: In Full Bloom
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. If you have the city's blessing, untap each land you control.

card.name: Frosted Landscape
card.text: As Frosted Landscape enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Dawn Prarie
card.text: As Dawn Prarie enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Tranquil Meadow
card.text: As Tranquil Meadow enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Frozen Cavern
card.text: This land enters tapped. When it does, sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.) {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Peacful Jungle
card.text: This land enters tapped. When it does, sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.) {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Submerged Woodland
card.text: This land enters tapped. When it does, sift 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your sanctum.) {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Druid of High Earth // Commune
card.text:
Whenever Druid of High Earth enters or attacks, you may cast a copy of its omen without paying its mana cost. If you don't, put a +1/+1 counter on Druid of High Earth.
---
Create a 1/1 green Druid creature token. Surveil 1. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Forsaken Worlds
card.text: You may play an additional land each turn. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life. If it's the second time the ability has resolved this turn, draw a card. If it's the third, create two 1/1 green Dryad creature tokens. If it's the fourth, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
